subject: Write shared types (src/shared/types.ts + parse.ts)
description: All shared type definitions per handoff doc. ChatEvent discriminated union, raw filesystem types, SessionState, card types, JournalEntry, ParsedSystemEvent. Parse utilities: tryParseSystemEvent, isLeadAgent, generateEventId, parseTimestamp, isWithinWindow.

subject: Build server components (watcher, processor, journal, server)
description: FileWatcher with fs.watch + 100ms debounce. EventProcessor with broadcast detection (500ms hold), idle suppression (30s), task claim correlation (120s), dependency cascades. Journal with JSONL append. TeamchatServer with Bun.serve, GET /state, WS /ws.

subject: CLI entry point + replay mode
description: bin/teamchat.ts — parse args (--team, --watch, --replay, --port, --compact, --no-journal, --share, setup). Wire all components. Replay mode reads JSONL with timestamp-based playback.

subject: Scaffold React client components
description: index.html, App.tsx, client-only types.ts, 14 component stubs, 4 hook stubs, styles/index.css with Tailwind directives.

subject: Implement full React client with styling
description: Full component implementation: ChatMessage, SystemEvent, ThreadBlock, ReactionRow, PlanApprovalCard, PermissionRequestCard, TaskSidebar, TaskCard, PresenceRoster, SessionStats, MessageList, Header, AgentAvatar, NewMessageIndicator. Hooks: useChatReducer, useWebSocket, useAutoScroll, useRelativeTime. Dark theme, animations, auto-scroll.

subject: Create fixture generator for healthdash-sprint
description: config.ts (5 members), tasks.ts (8 tasks + 17 state transitions), events.ts (~40+ transcript entries), generate.ts (routes events to inbox files).

subject: Write package.json, tsconfig.json, README
description: package.json (name teamchat, bin config, Bun runtime, scripts). tsconfig.json (strict, ESNext, react-jsx, bun-types). README (quick start, hook config, CLI reference, how it works, replay mode).

subject: Write integration tests
description: 6 test files: processor.test.ts, broadcast.test.ts, dm-threads.test.ts, idle-suppression.test.ts, task-cascade.test.ts, reactions.test.ts.

subject: End-to-end verification
description: Generate fixtures, start server, open browser, verify chat renders correctly. All message types, reactions, DM threads, task sidebar, presence roster, session stats.
